channel.title: Maybank JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [MAEMOT-35] Maybank Overseas Transfer SWIFT Fee Calculation Update on MAE
item.description:
To update SWIFT wire transfer fee calculation for Maybank Overseas Transfer (MOT) on MAE as per BNM new directive:

New Business Requirement

a) Update service fee structure for overseas SWIFT transfers:

  • Flat fee: RM 10.00 per transaction (previously RM 8.00)
  • Agent/Beneficiary bank fee: As per correspondent bank schedule
  • SST 8% applicable on service fee only

b) Exchange rate display must show live BNM rate with timestamp

c) IBAN validation must be enforced for all European destinations

Technical Changes

1. Update fee_logic in MOTTransferDetails.js to reflect new fee structure
2. Add IBAN format validation for EU destination countries
3. Integrate live exchange rate API (BNM FX endpoint)
4. Update SWIFT message generation to include new fee breakdown
5. Update error handling for SWIFT gateway timeout scenarios
6. Update Total Amount calculation: Principal + Service Fee + SST + Agent Fee
7. Add validate function for SWIFT/BIC code format

Confirmation Page Changes

a) Show itemised fee breakdown on confirmation screen

b) Display exchange rate with BNM timestamp

c) Show estimated arrival date for SWIFT transfer

Technical Changes:
1. Update confirmation API response to include fee itemisation
2. Add ledger posting for both service fee and agent fee separately
3. Update audit trail to capture SWIFT reference number
item.summary: Maybank Overseas Transfer SWIFT Fee Calculation Update on MAE
